solution.p: Since -12 divides evenly into -108, the result is an integer. Note that dividing a negative number by a negative number results in a positive number. The result is 9.
The numerator and denominator have a greatest common factor of 4. Dividing this out of each, the result is {\frac{1}{9}}.
Since 10 divides evenly into -40, the result is an integer. Its -4.

Note that dividing a negative number by a negative number results in a positive number. The numerator and denominator have a greatest common factor of 2. Dividing this out of each, the result is {\frac{5}{6}}.
